## What I Build

I ship **production-grade agentic AI systems** — not demos, not prototypes. Real platforms that run 24/7, handle failures gracefully, and solve actual business problems.

Currently: Founder of **Twilight Tech LLC**, building AI-powered cybersecurity and automation tools end-to-end as a solo engineer using Claude Code as my primary AI pair-programming partner.
